弄哭的女孩有个交代，这个写的很不好[微笑]相当劝退了（这么写，感觉男主人品有问题）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1693223189,"group_id":"7247163603269192761","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3465297847652248"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7247163603269192761","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.2104793e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"6","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":22104,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7270486037721088787","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错挺好的👌稍微有一点水，但对我来说没啥影响，更水的我也见过了。女主写的挺好的，单多我都可以，感情戏写的挺好[偷笑]别写崩了就行（我要求不高吧）看着更新也还行（有点问题，就是主角以后要有俘虏的话，希望能控制他的生死，不要出现背叛啥的情况）海岛上的资源信息希望小改一下（不强求，就是重复的资源不写，光写重要的资源，看多了有点儿累）目前来说挺好的，不错的小说[思考]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1692792075,"group_id":"7247163603269192761","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"咸鱼","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4iYtlFc376HW32lEnZlJAdcr/DtvYODCDs497ufSwup","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cc2b585da7bc4aeda9c6099b9a30813c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793815&x-signature=8FjJe2RHYNEKju8h0mRFh6fc%2BRs%3D","user_id":"3465297847652248","user_name":"路过的神兽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3465297847652248","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1645603808,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7247163603269192761","book_info":{"abstract":"轻松搞笑｜种田养成求生文
（主角人设：贱兮兮，介意勿扰！）
一觉醒来，
全民进入无尽航海世界，
开局2人一艘小木筏，
木筏会累积经验，逐步进化！
[木筏]→[渔船]→[轮船]→[战舰]
每2天，木筏会登陆神秘海岛一次。
早上6点，木筏准时抵达神秘海岛，供求生者登岛搜集物资。
下午6点，木筏准时离开神秘海岛，未成功登上船的求生者将永远留在岛上。
无尽航海世界，
为求生者配备了交易、制作系统。
搜集到的物资可以用来以物易物，
亦可以将其制作成更有价值的物品。
......
主角宁风，一觉醒来，
竟是发现自己的同伴是个顶级萝莉美女，
除此之外，
他似乎还获得了洞察系统！
从那以后，
他可以洞察一切，
无论是海岛上的物资方位还是危险区域，
亦或者人心！
这不，
眼睁睁地看着萝莉女同伴对自己的好感由-50到85！
加油，好感度到达90就能将她推倒了！
宁风：“哎呀，无敌是多么寂寞！”
宁风：“航海求生我最强，大家称我海贼王！”
宁风：“还有，你这个作者，能不能别叭叭了？一个简介都想不好！”
宁风：“我要是你，我就以量取胜！一天更新10万字！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o3b6416a5554cd7da4bc6f42cde145650~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"安之骄","author_id":"","book_id":"7247163603269192761","book_name":"全民木筏求生，而我早已开上航母","book_short_name":"无尽航海","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383840","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7247167221561197090","read_count":"12792","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1013502"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"494","tags":"科幻末世,系统,穿越,末世,求生,末日求生,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/92702236e51523b3d372892d01d8f0fa~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449600&x-signature=215ijo3A3S0u5PGyRX7%2FiMPdvxU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111037490059","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.9409107e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231933208136229696BE91359CCB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":57,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19408,"reply_count":8,"show_pv":41224},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7307969222093046563","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者很优秀，这是我看的第一部小说，感觉很好看。有些是“安雨澄”的个人形象塑造的非常好，真的有了一种贤妻良母的感觉。重新谢谢作者。(*^o^*)"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1701521189,"group_id":"7247163603269192761","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"可可爱爱，没有脑袋","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3UaQPCnomzb+2+uu0W3mjntsNULIasYrqmxoM30oM7g","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0fc4932fe7ad4743938c6df5b2567122~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794895&x-signature=8pNHOokZJaXkYUnVSyvz7w%2BtgIU%3D","user_id":"3584011691887828","user_name":"猫之茗茗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3584011691887828","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7247163603269192761","book_info":{"abstract":"轻松搞笑｜种田养成求生文
